title: peg-solitaire-atlas: solvers, generators, and atlases for peg solitaire on unicyclic graphs
description: Exact peg-solitaire solvers, non-isomorphic tree and unicyclic-graph generators, verification scripts against published theorems, and exhaustive solvability atlases (all trees on up to 18 vertices; all unicyclic graphs on up to 14 vertices). Supporting code and data for the manuscript "Peg solitaire on unicyclic graphs: crowns, cycle-critical graphs, and two atlases" by Krishna Harish.

creators.name: Harish, Krishna
creators.affiliation: Elkins High School, Missouri City, Texas, USA
